question: What major is every student who does not own a cat as a pet, and also how old are they?
gold_sql: SELECT major ,  age FROM student WHERE stuid NOT IN (SELECT T1.stuid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid  =  T2.petid WHERE T3.pettype  =  'cat')
predicted_sql: SELECT col_6, col_4 FROM student WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT T1.col_1 FROM has_pet AS T1 JOIN pets AS T2 ON T1.col_2 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_3 = 'cat')
raw_response: SELECT col_6, col_4 FROM student WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT T1.col_1 FROM has_pet AS T1 JOIN pets AS T2 ON T1.col_2 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_3 = 'cat')
